# Dependencies
node_modules/

# Environment variables
.env

# Logs
logs
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# Runtime files
pids
*.pid
*.seed
*.pid.lock

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# IDE files
.vscode/
.idea/

# Build folders
dist/
build/

# Temporary files
tmp/
temp/

# Coverage
coverage/

# Cache
.cache/

# Optional package lock
# package-lock.json

# Uploads (optional if storing user uploads locally)
uploads/

# Generated files
*.tgz

# Local database files
*.sqlite
*.db

# Misc
.env.local
.env.development.local
.env.test.local
.env.production.local
